managelm.note: Set MCP_URL to your ManageLM portal MCP endpoint, e.g. https://app.managelm.com/mcp (SaaS) or https://portal.example.com/mcp (self-hosted). Auth is fully automatic: Claude self-registers via OAuth 2.0 Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591) and prompts you to sign in to your ManageLM account on first connection — no client_id/secret to copy.
